device_name: Cydar EV (Series B) and Cydar EV Maps
intended_use: Cydar EV is intended to assist fluoroscopic X-ray guided endovascular procedures in the chest, abdomen, and pelvis by presenting the operative plan in the context of intraoperative fluoroscopy. Cydar
intended_use_full: Cydar EV is intended to assist fluoroscopic X-ray guided endovascular procedures in the chest, abdomen, and pelvis by presenting the operative plan in the context of intraoperative fluoroscopy. Cydar EV is intended to be used for patients undergoing a fluoroscopic X-ray guided endovascular surgery in the chest abdomen and pelvis, and who have had a pre-operative CT-scan.
target_condition: Endovascular procedures requiring anatomical guidance, including endovascular aortic aneurysm repair, angioplasty, stenting, and embolization
other_metrics: Pass/Fail criteria for verification and validation testing (specific metrics not reported)
